title: serapias neglecta subsp. neglecta
intro: Serapias neglecta subsp. neglecta, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever and digestive problems. The health benefits of Serapias neglecta subsp. neglecta include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential natural remedy for cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
